messages.preview: Please see attached an email about the Parkinson’s Nurse service in Gloucestershire. If anyone is struggling and needs any advice or support

And the final page….how about

Every story has a beginning. Start yours with Chapter One.

Just added a couple of words

Sorry missed “a"
Don’t take chances with CO alarms - if it is sounding leave the area and make sure ventilated - they can give a false alarm but veer on the
Looks good right? Real people creating real solutions!

lead.headline: Teresa's resignation requires immediate attention and transition planning.
lead.deck: With no details logged on timing or transition, this departure needs clarification on effective date and handover priorities. Getting ahead of it now prevents operational disruption.
